metadata.name: PodFetch
metadata.description: PodFetch is a sleek and efficient self-hosted podcast manager written in Rust. It automatically downloads new episodes, offers a web UI for listening and managing podcasts, and provides a GPodder-compatible sync API so you can keep using podcast apps like AntennaPod.
metadata.tagline: Sleek podcast downloader with GPodder sync
metadata.author: SamTV12345

environment_variables.name: DATABASE_URL
environment_variables.description: SQLite database location (or a PostgreSQL connection string)

environment_variables.name: POLLING_INTERVAL
environment_variables.description: Minutes between checks for new episodes

environment_variables.name: BASIC_AUTH
environment_variables.description: Set to true to enable login (required for GPodder sync); also set USERNAME and PASSWORD

environment_variables.name: USERNAME
environment_variables.description: Admin username when BASIC_AUTH is enabled

environment_variables.name: PASSWORD
environment_variables.description: Admin password when BASIC_AUTH is enabled

environment_variables.name: GPODDER_INTEGRATION_ENABLED
environment_variables.description: Set to true to enable the GPodder-compatible sync API for apps like AntennaPod

after_install.en_us: Access the web UI at http://your-server:8000. To sync with mobile apps like AntennaPod, set BASIC_AUTH=true, USERNAME, PASSWORD and GPODDER_INTEGRATION_ENABLED=true, then create users via the web UI (User Administration > Invites).
